meaning: discothequen.迪斯科舞,以唱片伴奏的小舞厅;v.进迪斯科舞厅
examples: A sit-down dinner was followed by a disco.
Fridays and Saturdays are regular disco nights.
She wants to go the disco party.
Maybe the silly names are another boomer trend, like disco, asymmetrical hairstyles, Botox and spray tans.
Chic guitarist Nile Rodgers features alongside Williams on Daft Punk's new disco inspired track.
